title: VocaFlow
oneliner: Multi-tenant platform for building and deploying AI voice agents across phone, chat, and WhatsApp.
bullets: Designed a multi-tenant platform where users build and deploy AI voice agents across phone, chat, and WhatsApp.
Built real-time voice agents with knowledge retrieval, data collection, and human handoff at sub-second latency.
Enabled businesses to offer 24/7 customer engagement without added headcount, handling inquiries, bookings, and support.
stack: React, FastAPI, Supabase, OpenAI Realtime API, Twilio, Stripe, Redis, Docker, Azure

title: 8-Agent Dev Team
oneliner: A full software team staffed by Claude Code agents, running complete sprint workflows solo.
bullets: Built a team of 8 specialized Claude Code agents (PM, Frontend, Backend, AI, DevOps, QA, Test, Docs) coordinated through Notion and GitHub.
Ran full sprint workflows solo, from backlog planning to PR review and merge.
Shipped 170+ GitHub issues and 726 automated tests across a ~40,000 line codebase in about 4 weeks.
stack: Claude Code, Notion MCP, GitHub CLI, Playwright MCP

title: Multi-Agent Prospecting System
oneliner: Agents that research, qualify, and analyze prospects, then write the outreach and the reports.
bullets: Designed a multi-agent system to research, qualify, and analyze prospects, generating strategic reports.
Built specialized agents for opportunity analysis, competitor research, and personalized outreach generation.
Reduced manual prospecting time by ~80% and automated report delivery and CRM integration.

title: Content Creation Automation
oneliner: Automated research, generation, and publication of Facebook content, with a human checkpoint before anything ships.
bullets: Built a platform automating research, generation, and publication of Facebook content across objectives.
Orchestrated specialized agents per source (news, websites, documents) with email validation before publishing.
Implemented automated comment moderation and intelligent responses based on a knowledge base.
stack: Python, n8n, MCP, Meta Developer, Tavily, ChromaDB

title: Recruitment Automation System
oneliner: Four interconnected pipelines covering candidate intake, AI scoring, ATS sync, and lead generation.
bullets: Built four interconnected pipelines covering candidate intake, AI scoring, ATS synchronization, and lead generation.
Scored candidates against job requirements using weighted signals, generating clear reasoning behind every shortlist decision and triggering automated shortlist emails and Telegram alerts.
Synced candidate data automatically across the ATS, kanban board, and public job board, keeping every system up to date in real time.
stack: n8n, Make, REST APIs, Webhooks, Telegram, Notion

title: Airline Customer Service Assistant
oneliner: GenAI capstone (Kaggle × Google): structured-dialogue assistant with RAG over a dedicated knowledge base.
bullets: Designed a conversational assistant that collects customer information through structured dialogue.
Reduced repetitive customer support tasks by automating the handling of frequent inquiries.
Integrated an intelligent search engine to provide contextualized responses from a dedicated knowledge base.
stack: Python, LangChain, ChromaDB, RAG, Gradio, Gemini

title: Pedagog'IA
oneliner: Social platform for Tunisian teachers with AI generation of fiches, quizzes, and exercises.
bullets: Built a social platform for Tunisian teachers to share resources, combined with an AI feature generating fiches, quizzes, and exercises.
Implemented an AI credits system, admin panel, and full social feed feature set.
Designed the AI generation flow around subject, level, and chapter inputs for fast lesson prep.
stack: Next.js, FastAPI, Supabase, pgvector, GitHub Models (gpt-4o-mini)

title: TT Assistant
oneliner: Multilingual voice + text chatbot for Tunisie Telecom. 3rd place at the AI for CSR Hackathon.
bullets: Built an inclusive multilingual chatbot for Tunisie Telecom supporting Arabic, French, English, and Tunisian dialect.
Enabled both voice and text interaction using Whisper for speech and GPT-4o for responses.
Won 3rd place at the AI for CSR Hackathon.
stack: GPT-4o, Whisper, LangChain, FastAPI, n8n, Telegram

title: 5G Throughput Prediction
oneliner: Full MLOps pipeline comparing 300+ models on Azure ML, explainable and monitored in production.
bullets: Built a full MLOps pipeline predicting 5G network throughput, comparing 300+ models via Azure ML.
Added explainability with SHAP and GPT-4o to make model decisions interpretable for non-technical stakeholders.
Deployed the pipeline in Docker with monitoring through Elasticsearch and Kibana.
stack: Azure ML, FastAPI, Docker, Elasticsearch, Kibana, SHAP, MLflow, GitHub Actions

title: Industrial Anomaly Detection
oneliner: CNN autoencoder trained only on defect-free screws flags visual defects by reconstruction error.
bullets: Built a CNN autoencoder trained only on defect-free images to flag visual defects through reconstruction error.
Delivered real-time inspection with confidence scoring for production line use.
Reduced manual inspection time by 70%.

title: Odoo Integrations
oneliner: Odoo CRM wired into a multi-agent prospecting system, plus a facial-recognition attendance module.
bullets: Integrated Odoo CRM into a multi-agent AI prospecting system for automated lead and pipeline updates.
Built a facial recognition attendance system integrated with Odoo's attendance module.

title: LeadGenMAP
oneliner: Platform that generates qualified leads from Google Maps with filterable criteria and CSV export.
bullets: Built a platform that generates leads from Google Maps with filterable search criteria and CSV export.
Reduced research time and improved prospect quality through automated extraction and filtering.
stack: Google Maps API, SerperAPI, FastAPI, Next.js, Docker

title: n8n Workflow Library
oneliner: Public collection of the n8n workflows behind my automation work, packaged for reuse.
bullets: Open-sourced production workflows including Facebook sales conversation automation and a hiring agent.
Includes facial recognition and tender processing flows built as reusable n8n templates.
